message:
Welcome to Version Confusion, the responsibility is on you to size up the problem.

? *Use `/help` at any time for a list of useful links and commands*
 ? *Use `/incident` to create an incident record*

Once youre ready just click start to begin
Hey guys im seeing an issue with the website loading slowly
Anyone else experaning this?
No all ok for me
No issue for me
What browser and version of it are you using Tanya?
Im using chrome and let me check the version
Ok if it is V105.0 this is a recorded bug with a ticket in the backlog
Yeah it is V105.0
Should we not raise an incident for this? I know I can update the version and it will stop effecting me.
But could this not be effecting customers?
Had a look at the market share of people using this version it is only at 0.09%
Still not sure if it should not be an incidnt. @praveen.sadul-dominos.co.uk What do you think?
hi @bob  any user complaints ?
:star: Asking questions to validate impact of the problem
I'll check now
There have been some reports over the last two weeks of users reporting slow loading times
I believe a ticket was created for this about two weeks ago
*Incident Number INC1041:* P1 Website slow loading
:star: Incident record created
Really dont think we need an incident. As I said we have a bug already and really need to focus on delivery of new features.
We've had this on the backlog as a bug we shouldn't really be making a fuss
Hi @daniel  webpage loading slow will impact business
Ohh the reports is actually showing that 20% of our customers are experiencing an issue where it is taking three times as long the website to load. Seeing a few timeouts occurring as well
What's the impact on revenue?
Hi all can some send me recent changes ?
:star: Check changes done to the platform
Sure thing!
Here you go:https://uptime-labs.atlassian.net/wiki/external/ZDQ1MTE3NWU5ZDYxNDA4MTkxZmM3ZGJmMGJhNmE1OTE
Do we know the impact of this issue, regional or global?
:bulb: keep the business informed regularly
Hi @bob  its regional impact ? also can you you help me impact ?
Please inform me via the business comms channel
I'll grab that info for you now...
Hi @bez   20% of our customers are experiencing an issue where it is taking three times as long the website to load. Seeing a few timeouts occurring as well
:star: Qualify the problem
This is a globally impacting issue with revenue being down by 10% over the last two weeks. It's also only being reported by users using chrome
we are working on it. will let you know impact soon
What should I advise our users to do in the meantime?
hi @bez  This is a globally impacting issue with revenue being down by 10% over the last two weeks. It's also only being reported by users using chrome
:star: Formally assign criticality level to the incident
hi @daniel  is that front end change affecting this issue ?
:star: Reviewed changes
I'm not sure, I would need to start investigating
We have a P1 Incident logged, let's make sure the team knows how urgent this incident is!!!
hi @daniel any idea what user base uses v105.0 ?
For that specific version it's only like... 0.09%
Users are not very happy, what should I tell them? A lot of people use chrome!
so 0.09 % user affecting the issue  ?
Well for V105.0
is only for chrome ?
Guys the impact is bigger than we thought
It's impacting users using V105.0 Chrome AND older
seem impact increasing
I use microsoft edge and it works fine for me, no timeouts
@tanya  can you help with version change please ?
Can you be more specific in what you'd like me to do?
I don't think we've figured out what's actually broken
so its seem only chrome and V105.0 Chrome AND r older version affecting
It could be related to the recent frontend deployement
We also deployed a change to frontend two weeks ago also
Hi @daniel  what was changes related to version that related to front end ?
Which change are you referring to?
can you give me recent frontend deployement ?

Change ID: CHG89553

Owner: Daniel

Service: FrontEndService

Environment: PROD

Version: 0.5.0-14.2.1

Time Of Change: 21 hours ago

Description: Deployment of FrontEndService cleaning up repository by removing code/files that were no longer needed.
:bulb: Form strategy for troubleshooting, use whole team to execute
Have we got the whole team engaged with investigating?
hi @hamed do you have idea about which changes affecting it ?
@bez is needs answers for the shareholders
I'll need a high level summary of the situation, I was supporting a sales call prior to this
I would like to add, what evidence have we got to support whatever's happening is change related
Hi @tinus , we find out the issue we about to fix will inform you shortly
hi @shay can you help with  last two weeks  changes ?

The changes we deployed two weeks ago were: Change to frontend in Prod 

Change to ad service in Prod
I don't mind helping but... you need to be less vague

Thank you for playing Version Confusion, We recommend that you take 5 minutes to go and get a drink or stretch your legs.
Once you are back we ask that you complete this retrospective and feedback form, just hit start when you are ready.
hi @daniel  its front end issue we have to revert changes - CHG89553
can you please quickly recert CHG89553 please
